top_signals.title: Asia markets set for mixed open as oil falls on Hormuz reopening hopes
top_signals.summary: Asia-Pacific markets were set to open mixed Monday amid reports that the crucial Strait of Hormuz may reopen soon, pushing oil prices down and lifting investor sentiment.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
